de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.po

Class ProgramMethodPO

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractOperationPO
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.po.ProgramMethodPO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProgramMethodSubsetPO

    public class ProgramMethodPO
extends AbstractOperationPO

    This proof obligation executes an IProgramMethod with an optional precondition.

    The generated Sequent has the following form: 

     
 ==>
 <generalAssumptions> &
 <preconditions>
 ->
 <updatesToStoreInitialValues>
 <modalityStart>
 exc=null;try {<methodBodyStatement>}catch(java.lang.Exception e) {exc = e}
 <modalityEnd>
 (exc = null & <postconditions > & <optionalUninterpretedPredicate>)

      • ProgramMethodPO

        public ProgramMethodPO(InitConfig initConfig,
                       java.lang.String name,
                       IProgramMethod pm,
                       java.lang.String precondition)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - The InitConfig to use.
        name - The name to use.
        pm - The IProgramMethod to execute code parts from.
        precondition - An optional precondition to use.

      • ProgramMethodPO

        public ProgramMethodPO(InitConfig initConfig,
                       java.lang.String name,
                       IProgramMethod pm,
                       java.lang.String precondition,
                       boolean addUninterpretedPredicate,
                       boolean addSymbolicExecutionLabel)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - The InitConfig to use.
        name - The name to use.
        pm - The IProgramMethod to execute code parts from.
        precondition - An optional precondition to use.
        addUninterpretedPredicate - true postcondition contains uninterpreted predicate, false uninterpreted predicate is not contained in postcondition.
        addSymbolicExecutionLabel - true to add the SymbolicExecutionTermLabel to the modality, false to not label the modality.

      • buildOperationBlocks

        protected ImmutableList<StatementBlock> buildOperationBlocks(ImmutableList<LocationVariable> formalParVars,
                                                             ProgramVariable selfVar,
                                                             ProgramVariable resultVar,
                                                             Services services)
        Builds the code to execute in different statement blocks. 1. code to execute before the try block 2. code to execute in the try block 3. code to execute in the catch block 4. code to execute in the finally block
        Specified by:
        buildOperationBlocks in class AbstractOperationPO
        Parameters:
        formalParVars - Arguments from formal parameters for method call.
        selfVar - The self variable.
        resultVar - The result variable.
        services - services instance
        Returns:
        operation blocks as statement blocks

        selfVar - The self variable.
        paramVars - The parameters ProgramVariables.
        atPreVars - Mapping of LocationVariable to the LocationVariable which contains the initial value.

      • isMakeNamesUnique

        protected boolean isMakeNamesUnique()
        Checks if self variable, exception variable, result variable and method call arguments should be renamed to make sure that their names are unique in the whole KeY application.
        Overrides:
        isMakeNamesUnique in class AbstractOperationPO
        Returns:
        true use unique names, false use original names even if they are not unique in whole KeY application.

      • isCopyOfMethodArgumentsUsed

        protected boolean isCopyOfMethodArgumentsUsed()
        Checks if a copy of the method call arguments are used instead of the original method arguments.
        Overrides:
        isCopyOfMethodArgumentsUsed in class AbstractOperationPO
        Returns:
        true use copy of method call arguments, false use original method call arguments.

      • fillSaveProperties

        public void fillSaveProperties(java.util.Properties properties)
                        throws java.io.IOException
        This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
        Specified by:
        fillSaveProperties in interface IPersistablePO
        Overrides:
        fillSaveProperties in class AbstractOperationPO
        Parameters:
        properties - The Properties to fill with the proof obligation specific settings.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • getProgramMethodSignature

        public static java.lang.String getProgramMethodSignature(IProgramMethod pm,
                                                         boolean includeType)
                                                  throws java.io.IOException
        Returns a human readable full qualified method signature.
        Parameters:
        pm - The IProgramMethod which provides the signature.
        includeType - Include the container type?
        Returns:
        The human readable method signature.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

                                                        java.util.Properties properties)

        Instantiates a new proof obligation with the given settings.

        properties - The settings of the proof obligation to instantiate.

        public static IProgramMethod getProgramMethod(InitConfig initConfig,
                                              java.util.Properties properties)

        properties - The settings of the proof obligation to instantiate.
        Returns:
        The found IProgramMethod.
